# Reliable Process Reliabilism

**Node Type:** synthesis
**Node ID:** fb28d755-2289-47b3-a86d-e573b8236991
**Depth:** 5
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [Is knowledge always dependent on cognitive abilities?](is-knowledge-always-dependent-on-cognitive-abilities-antithesis-e7456a93-32b7-4d5d-b17e-6efe1031b0ab.md)

## Content

**Knowledge is true belief produced by a reliable cognitive process**, **A person knows a proposition if their belief is generated by a process that reliably leads to truth**, **A person knows a proposition if the proposition is true**, **A person knows a proposition if their belief is not formed by luck or chance**
